heading: Definitions
label: 541 Definitions
notes: References in TextThe effective date of this chapter, referred to in par. (2), is 60 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Nov. 25, 2002section 4 of Pub. L. 107–296section 101 of this title

children.text: The term “agency” includes any entity, organizational unit, program, or function.
The term “transition period” means the 12-month period beginning on the effective date of this chapter.
